review_comment: Don't we want `,` to be a valid separator?
',' is also valid hotkey. Using ',' as separator causes to misinterpret. Space or Tab is only valid for this situation because  we store them as 'Space' or 'Tab' not actual  characters
It was empty string when no context given, like in this page.
What does it look like now?

![image](https://github.com/files-community/Files/assets/62196528/2641364a-608e-4763-9f0a-3b806b2b2abf)

Looks not nice but better than nothing to show. It'd be better if we add simple title for this situation too as you suggested for Install commands.
I'm not sure why should use that though.
